title: Fear detects equipped creature pre-battle roll gate

card.rawText: The equipped creature must roll 1 die prior to battle. If the result is 1-4: Creature may battle as normal. If the result is 5-6: Creature cannot cause damage.

plan.title: Fear detects equipped creature pre-battle roll gate
plan.summary: Equip Fear, start a battle with the equipped creature, and verify the battle timing trigger is detected before battle resolution.

notes: Equip Fear to player_1 primary creature.
Run a battle with the equipped creature attacking.

steps: Equip Fear to player_1 primary creature.
Declare battle with the equipped creature.
Verify Fear is detected as a prior-to-battle roll gate.
manualVerification: Resolve the missing roll table manually: 1-4 allows battle as normal; 5-6 means the equipped creature cannot cause damage for the current battle.
riskNotes: This fixture validates battle trigger detection only. It does not automate the 1D6 branch result yet.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Fear's pre-battle roll gate detection before implementing full branch resolution.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
